'''thatana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scabbling|scabbling]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-t-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scabbling|scabbling]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thatana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thætænæth|thætænæth]] || [[word:thætænæj|thætænæj]] || [[word:thætænæsh|thætænæsh]] || [[word:thætænæ|thætænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatatanath|thatatanath]] || [[word:thatatanaj|thatatanaj]] || [[word:thatatanash|thatatanash]] || [[word:thatatana|thatatana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatanath|thatanath]] || [[word:thatanaj|thatanaj]] || [[word:thatanash|thatanash]] || [[word:thatana|thatana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatafnath|thatafnath]] || [[word:thatafnaj|thatafnaj]] || [[word:thatafnash|thatafnash]] || [[word:thatafnaf|thatafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thatanatha|thatanatha]] || [[word:thatanaja|thatanaja]] || [[word:thatanasha|thatanasha]] || [[word:thatanaka|thatanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thatanath|thatanath]] || [[word:thatanaj|thatanaj]] || [[word:thatanash|thatanash]] || [[word:thatana|thatana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thatanathal|thatanathal]] || [[word:thatanajal|thatanajal]] || [[word:thatanashal|thatanashal]] || [[word:thatanakal|thatanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thatanathatha|thatanathatha]] || [[word:thatanajaja|thatanajaja]] || [[word:thatanashasha|thatanashasha]] || [[word:thatanaka|thatanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thatanathan|thatanathan]] || [[word:thatanajan|thatanajan]] || [[word:thatanashan|thatanashan]] || [[word:thatanakan|thatanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thatanathaoro|thatanathaoro]] || [[word:thatanajaoro|thatanajaoro]] || [[word:thatanashaoro|thatanashaoro]] || [[word:thatanakaoro|thatanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
